audit_items.proof_trace: Both price inputs (`assetInUsdPrice` and `assetOutUsdPrice`) are obtained exclusively through `_getAssetPrice`, which normalizes all prices to 18 decimals on every return path (Data Streams normalized at store time in PriceManager.sol:166-172; Data Feed fallback normalized at read time in PriceManager.sol:396-400). The `priceMultiplier` is also 1e18-scaled (struct docs confirm 18-decimal precision), and `mulWadUp`/`mulDivUp` correctly handle WAD arithmetic throughout — no mixed-decimal operations exist.
